name: Hoyne Bancorp, Inc.
business: Hoyne Bancorp, Inc. is a savings and loan holding company whose primary business activity is owning all of the outstanding shares of capital stock of Hoyne Savings Bank. Hoyne Savings Bank is an Illinois-chartered stock savings bank that offers deposit accounts and originates loans secured by real estate, including one-to-four residential mortgages, commercial real estate, commercial and industrial loans, and home equity lines of credit. The company serves customers in Cook County, Illinois and adjacent communities.
sellsTo: Individuals in Cook County, Illinois and adjacent communities
Businesses in Cook County, Illinois and adjacent communities

exposures.sentence: One of our lending activities consists of the origination of loans secured by first mortgages on one to four residences and home equity lines of credit in our market area.
Our commercial real estate portfolio is primarily secured by income producing properties, such as retail and multifamily.
As of December 31, 2025, we had $23.2 million of commercial and industrial loans, representing 8.4% of our total loan portfolio.
Our commercial construction portfolio consists primarily of loans for single family and multifamily homes.

We have authority to invest in various types of securities, including mortgage-backed securities, U.S. Treasury obligations, securities of various federal agencies and of state and municipal governments, certificates of deposit at federally insured banks and savings institutions, and federal funds.
